title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that creates knowledge graphs from code repositories without using RAG, enabling Claude Code to better understand large codebases with reduced token overhead. The tool addresses memory and context limitations when working with large code bases.
